summary: Iteration 23 - Haiti Lotteries Renamed & Lottery Flags Features Testing Complete. All 14 Haiti lotteries have been renamed without hours (Tennessee Matin instead of Tennessee Matin 10h15). Super Admin lottery flags page at /super/lottery-flags shows 234 total lotteries (14 HAITI + 220 USA). Supervisor lottery flags page working. Vendeur profile page shows ID Appareil / POS field. Commission only displays when configured > 0.
seed_data_creation: Used existing test users: jefferson@jmstudio.com, supervisor@lotopam.com, admin@lotopam.com, agent.marie@lotopam.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 23 features are working correctly. Haiti lotteries have been renamed without hours. Super Admin and Supervisor lottery flags pages are functional. Vendeur profile page shows ID Appareil / POS field and commission only when configured.

haiti_lotteries_renamed.details: 14 Haiti lotteries renamed without hours: Tennessee Matin (not 10h15), Texas Midi (not 13h24), Georgia Midi (not 12h25), etc.

super_admin_lottery_flags_page.details: Page at /super/lottery-flags shows 234 total lotteries (14 HAITI + 220 USA), filter buttons work, stats display correctly

super_admin_lottery_flags_api.details: GET /api/super/lottery-flags returns 234 lotteries with correct flag_type. Stats endpoint returns total=234, haiti=14, usa=220

supervisor_lottery_flags_page.details: Page at /supervisor/lottery-flags shows all lotteries with flag configuration. Filter and search work correctly.

supervisor_lottery_flags_api.details: GET /api/supervisor/lottery-flags returns lotteries with correct structure. Toggle endpoint works.

vendeur_pos_field.details: Vendeur profile page shows 'ID Appareil / POS' field displaying pos_serial_number or 'NON ASSIGNÉ'

vendeur_commission_conditional.details: Commission section only shows if commission_rate > 0 (agent.marie has 10% commission, shown correctly)

api_endpoints_verified: POST /api/auth/login - All user types login correctly
GET /api/supervisor/lottery-flags - Returns lotteries with flag configuration
GET /api/vendeur/profile - Returns device/POS info and commission rate
notes: Haiti lottery names are now without hours (Tennessee Matin instead of Tennessee Matin 10h15)
Updated existing haiti-lottery-features.spec.ts to reflect new naming convention
All features from the request are working correctly
